# Rolling hashes on sequences

:::{.callout-note}
This chapter is partially adapted from [@simd-minimizers].
:::

## Rolling hashes and their properties

Introduced by @karp-rabin

### Constant-time updates

### Associativity

### Prefix trick

## NtHash and its variants

### Cyclic polynomial

### Bias for consecutive /kmers

Bias of default NtHash, see [this repo](https://github.com/imartayan/pfp-distribution)

### MulHash

## Vectorized implementation of NtHash

- start from a packed sequence as described in @sec-dna-rep
- parallel iteration on 8 chunks
- compute one hash per lane by xoring and shifting, vectorized table lookup
